$schema._comment: Source catalog for RigPlane Core. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the contributor flow. Keys follow scope.subscope.verbOrNoun (lowerCamelCase, ASCII, [a-zA-Z0-9.], <=80 chars). Interpolation uses {name}. A literal opening brace is written as '{'. Plurals use CLDR suffixes (.zero/.one/.two/.few/.many/.other). Glossary tokens (VFO/CW/MHz/brand names like RigPlane, Tower, rigctld, Hamlib) must never be translated — see frontend/src/lib/i18n/CONTRIBUTING.md sections 'Non-translatable tokens' and 'Glossary tokens'.

core.app.serverUnreachable: Server unreachable after multiple attempts. Check connection and reload manually.
core.statusbar.health.radioPoweredOff: radio appears powered off or unreachable
core.statusbar.power.toggleOn: Toggle power (radio is ON — click to power off)
core.statusbar.power.toggleOff: Toggle power (radio is OFF — click to power on)
core.statusbar.power.toggleUnknown: Toggle power (radio state unknown — click to toggle)
core.settings.title: SETTINGS
core.settings.language.label: Language
core.settings.language.helpText: Choose the language used by the RigPlane UI. Radio mode codes such as {modeToken} stay in English regardless of locale.
core.settings.language.srHint: Selecting a language updates the UI immediately and is saved on this device.
core.overlay.poweredOff.label: Radio is powered off
core.overlay.poweredOff.hint: Use the ON button in the status bar to power up
core.diagnostics.sendReport.title: Send Diagnostic Report
core.diagnostics.sendReport.helpText: Generates a redacted bundle of recent logs and configuration. You will see a full preview before anything is uploaded.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.placeholderD: What were you doing when the issue occurred?
core.diagnostics.sendReport.previewHelp: Review the bundle below. Nothing leaves this machine until you click Send.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.consent: I understand this bundle will be uploaded to the endpoint above and that my redacted logs may be reviewed by the maintainer.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.error.rateLi: Rate limited. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.error.bundle: Bundle too large. Try unchecking some categories.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.error.forbid: Server rejected the bundle (forbidden content detected). Review the manifest before submitting again.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.error.origin: Origin mismatch. Please reload the page and try again.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.error.previe: Preview expired. Generate a new one and try again.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.error.csrfMi: Session expired. Close and reopen the dialog to try again.
core.diagnostics.sendReport.error.networ: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
core.installPrompt.desktopInstruction: Install via browser menu for the best experience
core.toast.licenseExpired: Your license has expired. Reactivate to continue.
core.toast.readinessNoRadio: No radio is connected. Choose a radio in Setup.
core.toast.unknown: Something went wrong. Try again later.
core.mobile.nav.label: Radio navigation
core.mobile.chips.label: Mobile sections
core.mobile.tx.notAllowedFreq: TX not allowed on this frequency
core.mobile.receiverSelector.label: Receiver selector
core.error.transport.timeout.title: Connection Timed Out
core.error.transport.timeout.body: No response from {host}. Check that the radio is powered on and reachable.
core.error.literalBrace.example: Use '{'name} to refer to a placeholder.
